https://www.hyperdimensional.co/p/aviate.abstract: I have exciting news: I am writing a book! It is currently untitled and will be published next year by Penguin Press. The book will be a work of political theory just as much as it will be a book about AI. I cannot wait to tell you more about it. All I can say is that it is the most ambitious project I’ve ever undertaken, and an effort to answer—tentatively—questions I first asked here. Practically speaking, this does mean I expect my publication volume to drop, though I do not know how much. I expect a minimum of two essays per month, and hopefully more.
